name: Mexican Corn Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 egg or equivalent vegan egg replacer
1 cup nonfat milk (or rice or soy milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dry ingredients: Combine the yellow cornmeal, whole wheat flour, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Mix wet ingredients: In another bowl, whisk together the egg or vegan egg replacer, milk, creamed corn, chopped onion, chilies, jalapenos, and red bell pepper until well combined.
3. Blend together: Pour the wet mixture into the dry mixture and stir until just combined; do not overmix.
4. Spray a 8-inch pan with cooking spray.
5. Bake for 35 - 40 minutes, or until golden brown and a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
If you prefer more traditional cornbread, omit the onion and chilies, and add 1 tablespoon to 1/4 cup sugar if desired.
